# CGPatternTiling.noDistortion

**Case**

The pattern cell is not distorted when painted.The spacing between pattern cells may vary by as much as 1 devicepixel.

## Declaration

```swift
case noDistortion
```

## Constants

- **CGPatternTiling.constantSpacingMinimalDistortion**: Pattern cells are spaced consistently. Thepattern cell may be distorted by as much as 1 device pixel whenthe pattern is painted.
- **CGPatternTiling.constantSpacing**: Pattern cells are spaced consistently, as with [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPatternTiling/constantSpacingMinimalDistortion].The pattern cell may be distorted additionally to permit a moreefficient implementation.
